[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a small circled group of characters reading “FPS 168” over a darker background with additional faint text to the right.

The main focus is the circled overlay text “FPS 168,” with “FPS” clearly visible and “168” inside the circle, alongside partially visible text to the right that includes “PING” and “41 ms,” though the full right-side text is unclear.

The setting appears to be a digital or screen-like view with a dark, nearly uniform background; the lighting and environment are not physical and only the on-screen text is visible.

The text is in light gray against a dark background, while an orange circle highlights the “FPS 168” area; the camera angle is a direct, close crop, with the overlay text centered horizontally.

Visible Text:
“FPS 168” (circled) and “PING 41 ms” (right side, partly unclear)

Practical Summary:
The image displays an on-screen performance overlay with the “FPS 168” value highlighted by an orange circle. It also shows a “PING” value reading “41 ms,” with the rest of the overlay text unclear.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

FPS 168

# Structured Version

- **FPS:** 168

# Notes

- The screenshot is low-resolution/cropped; surrounding text like “PING 41 ms” is partially visible but not clear enough to extract accurately. The clearly readable text is **“FPS 168.”**

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
